author: DontBlameMe
description: Plays your custom tone/sound when you tick/complete a checkbox

manifest.author: DontBlameMe
manifest.description: Plays a tone when you tick a checkbox.
manifest.name: Tick Tones

name: Tick Tones

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- Move and require Obsidian 1.13
- Add support for the settings search API

* 1.13 by @DontBlameMe99 in https://github.com/DontBlameMe99/Tick-Tones/pull/193


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DontBlameMe99/Tick-Tones/compare/1.6.11...1.7.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: do not play sounds outside of markdown view by @DontBlameMe99 in https://github.com/DontBlameMe99/Tick-Tones/commit/0f4c16431198be382f9a9eedef7f16b9cd5675f2
* chore(deps): bump actions/attest-build-provenance from 3 to 4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/DontBlameMe99/Tick-Tones/pull/188
* chore(deps-dev): bump bun-types from 1.3.13 to 1.3.14 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/DontBlameMe99/Tick-Tones/pull/189
* Isolate `SoundLoader` test doubles to remove order-dependent CI failures by @Copilot in https://github.com/DontBlameMe99/Tick-Tones/pull/190


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DontBlameMe99/Tick-Tones/compare/1.6.10...1.6.11

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release includes some much-needed features 🥳

**Fixes:**
- The code is now minified in production, speeding up the loading times by a lot
- The main logic of the program now loads async (and only after Obsidian has started). This improves the startup times by a ton (from ~450ms to ~70ms)
- The sounds are now being cached, preventing memory leaks and improving overall performance

**Features:**
- You can now control the volume of the sound being played
- You can now add many more audio formats for your check sound (`.wav`, `.mp3`, `.ogg`, `.flac`, `.aac`, `.m4a`, `.opus` and `.webm`)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DontBlameMe99/Tick-Tones/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
The first actual new release 🥳

- Allow the plugin to be used on mobile
- Improve code structure and quality
- Improve documentation and messages
- Do not use unwanted API's

PS: These were changes requested by an Obsidian developer, found [here](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/5890#issuecomment-2816908068)
